_about: Infarction-experiment database config. Physical / Mitchell-Schaeffer parameters come from ukb/pipeline/params.json (the shared single source of truth); this file holds only the knobs specific to THIS experiment: simulation window, infarct geometry, and the stratified snapshot schedule. Follows Boulakia/Schenone/Gerbeau arXiv:1111.5926v2 section 3.3, with tau_out divided by 100 (paper uses 10).
_comment_time: Simulation window. 400 ms / 0.5 ms matches both the paper and params.json (t_end_ecg_ms / dt_ms).
_comment_infarct_model: tau_out_factor multiplies tau_out inside the scar ball; 0.01 = divide by 100. Healthy tissue keeps the params.json tau_out.
_comment_centres: n_centers infarct positions, clustered on the FRONT/visible epicardial wall seen in the GIFs (camera view_init(elev=18, azim=-62), scoring direction view_dir), à la Boulakia Fig 9. Candidates are EPI vertices whose front-facing score is above score_percentile; a high percentile keeps them in a compact anterior cap. n_centers of them are chosen by farthest-point sampling so they tile that cap rather than scatter around the whole heart.
_comment_radius: Scar ball radius (mm) drawn uniformly per infarct.
_comment_snapshots: Stratified HSP snapshots: window_split_ms divides [0, t_end] into an early window (depolarisation, where most variation is) and a late window (plateau / repolarisation, where the infarct ST/T signature lives). [n_early, n_late] snapshots per case. Boulakia: ~100 from the healthy case, ~50 per infarct, split half/half.
